headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Lululemon Athletica, Lowers Price Target to $184
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Brooke Roach   maintains Lululemon Athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $200 to $184.

headline: Is Lululemon Athletica (LULU) Pricing Reflect Recent Share Price Slide Accurately
summary: If you are wondering whether lululemon athletica's current share price offers value or risk, this article walks through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The shares last closed at US$166.43, with returns of a 4.5% decline over 7 days, 3.7% decline over 30 days, 21.1% decline year to date and 47.9% decline over 1 year, while the 3 and 5 year returns are a 43.6% decline and 46.1% decline respectively. Recently, the stock has been in focus as investors reassess growth...
